results.title: Merck, Bristol-Myers, J&J Deliver Q1 2026 Business Updates
Johnson & Johnson Bernstein webcast set for May 27 | JNJ Stock News
J&J Sees Continued MedTech Improvement in Q1, Eyes Better 2026
Johnson & Johnson Appoints Ryan Koors as Vice President, Investor Relations
Johnson & Johnson May 12 healthcare conference webcast | JNJ Stock News

summary_raw: J&J presented Phase 3 Vivacity-MG3 data at AAN 2026 for IMAAVY in myasthenia gravis with positive results. New IR VP Ryan Koors appointed effective May 7. Presentations at BofA Healthcare Conference May 12 and Bernstein May 27. Q1 2026 showed continued MedTech improvement. Dividend of $1.34/share with ex-date May 26.
